content.full_text:
Governor's Office

MEMORANDUM

To: Scott Hallabrin
    Acting General Counsel
    Fair Political Practices Commission

Fr: Janice Rogers Brown
    Legal Affairs Secretary

Date: April 11, 1991

Re: Gift Disclosure of Unsolicited Magazine

The Governor's Legal Affairs Office inquired whether an unsolicited magazine subscription was considered informational material and therefore excluded from disclosure.

It was affirmed that unsolicited magazine subscriptions are considered informational material and need not be disclosed in the Governor's Statement of Economic Interest Statement.

Thank you for your assistance.

cc: Dave Caffrey
    Dan Edwards
